{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219235275877A7D9E19C1FC7514"}"},"total":17},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7605270898103223102","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"文笔依旧不错，就是有点内容融梗和情节缝补。"},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1770742260,"group_id":"7550190784226528280","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N5riSrpV0H2Uuctsh9DESEnG1+aR+YLrelyjMCggq3O8","gender":0,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/000d9f7c18044ce09a91d4042effbd1a~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1776701764&x-signature=oZJGXjt8an7PjyBxby%2Fc4whtvIE%3D","user_id":"1625535486629723","user_name":"苏以言"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"1625535486629723","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7550190784226528280","book_info":{"abstract":"【霸道疯批皇帝vs清冷温柔权宦+受宠攻+无虐】
先帝十九子，唯有最不得宠的四皇子殷玄，以铁血手腕杀出一条登天路，脚踩尸骸，成为九五至尊。
景祚帝以武立威，言出法随，稍有忤逆便是血溅三尺。
百官战战兢兢，无人敢直视天子之怒。
却有一人，可近天子三尺之内。
此人便是司礼监掌印太监何宗。
司礼监掌印太监，乃是宦官之首，权力极大，素有“内相”之称。
朝臣皆知何宗是景祚帝唯一的心腹，御前红人。
奏折必经他手，政令多由他传。
他们或嫉妒或敬畏，却无人知晓，乾元殿深夜烛火摇曳时，那被帝王按在龙榻之上的，正是这位白日里让他们又恨又惧之人。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/p2o1cd68acc79e120cd1ddb45a17607c2ff~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"爱吃泥鳅的阮先生","author_id":"","book_id":"7550190784226528280","book_name":"阉君","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#281810","creation_status":"0","genre":"0","genre_type":"0","read_count_text":"2135人在读","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"1","category_schema":"[{"category_id":275,"name":"双男主","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=275&name=双男主&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":96,"name":"甜宠","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=96&name=甜宠&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":758,"name":"古代","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=758&name=古代&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":861,"name":"宠夫","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=861&name=宠夫&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":877,"name":"古色古香","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=877&name=古色古香&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"},{"category_id":1012,"name":"纯爱","schema":"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=1012&name=纯爱&genre_type=0&gender=0&source=detail"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7550213222708544024","read_count":"2135","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"105268"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"0","serial_count":"99","tags":"双男主,甜宠,古代,宠夫,古色古香,纯爱","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/p2o1cd68acc79e120cd1ddb45a17607c2ff~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1&x-expires=1779362632&x-signature=Bj7LsbJkyQca4rOQ%2FHnN7Vqx99g%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"1319006250738228","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":"29"},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{"channel_id":"","request_id":"2026032219235275877A7D9E19C1FC7514"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读34分钟后
